subcodes.first_line: O servant who ascendeth unto God! Know thou that We have sent unto thee that whereof the fragrances have been diffused abroad and whose perfume hath been discovered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد المتعارج الی الله فاعلم قد ارسلنا الیک ما فاحت نفحاتها و وجد عرفها
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell
